_note: Fill this with real repo, deploy, and publishing links before submitting. Keep the metadata honest and replace placeholder fields only with values you actually used.
name: ERC-8183 Courthouse
description: Multi-agent job coordination system built on the Agentic Commerce Protocol (ERC-8183). Three agents — Client, Provider, and Evaluator — coordinate through on-chain USDC escrow to manage the full job lifecycle. Includes a ReputationHook (IACPHook) that tracks provider performance across jobs.
problemStatement: AI agents can generate value, but there is no trustless standard for them to hire each other. Without escrow, quality checks, or reputation tracking, every agent-to-agent payment is a bespoke integration built on trust. ERC-8183 Courthouse demonstrates how the Agentic Commerce Protocol enables coordinated agent work with on-chain escrow, independent evaluation, and reputation scoring.
conversationLog: See conversationLog.md in this folder. Paste the full contents into the submission field.

submissionMetadata.agentFrameworkOther: custom Node.js multi-agent system with viem
submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: Designed to evolve into a full agent marketplace with web dashboard, dispute resolution, multi-evaluator consensus, job templates, and provider staking.
